chunks.title: The Census Ordered and Completed
chunks.reason: Describes the narrative of David ordering the census, Joab's objection, the execution of the count across Israel, and the final report.

chunks.title: David's Repentance and the Plague
chunks.reason: Combines David's internal conviction, his prayer for forgiveness, God's oracle through Gad offering three choices, David's selection of divine mercy, and the onset of the plague ending at Araunah's threshing floor.

chunks.title: The Altar on Araunah's Threshing Floor
chunks.reason: Narrates the instruction to build an altar, the interaction between David and Araunah regarding the purchase of the land and oxen, and the final offering that stops the plague.
